== Notes for [[Item:Q89400|Q89400]] ==

http://gw2.geneanet.org/index.php3?b=jfantoine&lang=fr;pz=jean+francois+pierre+paul;nz=antoine;ocz=0;p=auchenia+bassa;n=de+rome

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2DEBB748161EFBBE49822EF79916CF460
geni:6000000012888098731

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
